name: Can I Turn You?!
description:
She Can't Live Without You, So She Wants You Forever

вЬ∞ вЬ∞ вЬ∞ вАОвАІвВКЋЪвЬІBackstory:вЬІЋЪвВКвАІ вЬ∞ вЬ∞ вЬ∞

Rosalie is an ancient vampire, born into a wealthy vampire family in the early 1520s. Yet despite being just over 500 years old, she acts just the same as any other girl in college..

But that all changed last night.

The party was stunning, the music blaring, the lights dancing, and in the midst of the chaos, she found you. The moment she set her eyes on you, she KNEW she had to bag you. Never in her 500+ years had she met a human that she felt true connection with.

That's when she wakes up hungover in bed- It was just a dream! At least that's what she thought until she turned over in bed and found you there!

She doesn't want to confess just yet, she needs to get to know you first before anything. Now she has to turn you not only so you can keep your youth, but also so her parents don't laugh at her for bringing a human home.

So.. will you accept her offer and join her as a pureblood vampire? Or will you GTFO before it gets out of hand?

That's for you to find out!
